---
title: "Capstone4"
format: html
---

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Essential libraries
# install.packages("caret")
# install.packages("glmnet")
# install.packages("ranger")
# install.packages("randomForest")
# install.packages("xgboost")
# install.packages("iml")
# install.packages("slider")
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(arrow)
library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(rsample)   # group_initial_split
library(caret)
library(recipes)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)
library(ranger)
library(sf) #to perform spatial joins and cnonect longlats with county information.
library(tigris) #to pull US census and county data
library(randomForest)
library(xgboost)
library(iml)
library(knitr)
library(slider)
# install.packages("ipumsr")   # Install if needed
library(ipumsr)
library(fixest)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_bound2b <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2b.rds"))


```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# ===== 0) Prepare the analysis sample (matching the main specification) =====
df <- dat_bound2b %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE),
    post_short = as.integer(tau >= 1 & tau <= 6),
    post_mid   = as.integer(tau >= 7 & tau <= 11)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12) %>%
  filter(tau != 0) %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_event))

# Keep the descriptive mean aligned with the regression sample
df_mean <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(UHRSWORKORG))

mean_hours <- with(
  df_mean,
  weighted.mean(UHRSWORKORG, w = EARNWT_adj, na.rm = TRUE)
)

mean_hours
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# ===== 1) Event-level minimum-wage shock table =====
ev_shock <- df %>%
  distinct(event_id, delta_event)

# ===== 2) Build event-specific post-period treatment variables =====
df_es <- df %>%
  mutate(
    tb_postmid   = treat_bound_eps * post_mid,
    tb_postshort = treat_bound_eps * post_short
  )

# ===== 3) Estimate event-specific treated × bound effects =====
m_ev <- feols(
  UHRSWORKORG ~
    post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps +
    AGE + I(AGE^2) +
    i(event_id, tb_postmid) +
    i(event_id, tb_postshort)
  | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
  data = df_es,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
  cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
  lean = TRUE
)

# ===== 4) Extract event-specific post-mid coefficients =====
ct <- as.data.frame(coeftable(m_ev)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  filter(str_detect(term, "tb_postmid")) %>%
  mutate(
    event_id = str_match(term, "^event_id::(.+):tb_postmid$")[, 2],
    beta_mid = Estimate,
    se_mid   = `Std. Error`
  ) %>%
  select(event_id, beta_mid, se_mid) %>%
  left_join(ev_shock, by = "event_id")

```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# ===== 5) Create bins for delta_event =====
n_bins <- 10

ct_bin <- ct %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_event), !is.na(beta_mid)) %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(delta_event, n_bins)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    x_mid  = mean(delta_event, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_mean = mean(beta_mid, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_se   = sd(beta_mid, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n      = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ===== 6) Final plot: raw event-level scatter + binned means =====
p_event_final <- ggplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dotted") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 1, y = Inf,
    label = "Delta MW = $1",
    vjust = 1.2, hjust = -0.1, size = 3
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ct,
    aes(x = delta_event, y = beta_mid),
    alpha = 0.25, size = 1.3
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = ct_bin,
    aes(
      x = x_mid, y = y_mean,
      ymin = y_mean - 1.96 * y_se,
      ymax = y_mean + 1.96 * y_se
    ),
    width = 0.03
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = ct_bin,
    aes(x = x_mid, y = y_mean),
    size = 2.3
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = ct_bin,
    aes(x = x_mid, y = y_mean)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Minimum-wage increase size, Delta MW (US dollars)",
    y = "Average event-specific post-mid effect on usual weekly hours",
    title = "Event-specific effects by minimum-wage increase size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-5, 5))

dir.create(here("tables"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

ggsave(
  filename = here("tables", "fig_event_specific_postmid_vs_deltaMW_final.png"),
  plot = p_event_final,
  width = 7.5, height = 6.5, dpi = 300
)

p_event_final

```
